org.key_project.util.reflection

Interface IClassLoader

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    JavaApplicationClassLoader

    public interface IClassLoader
    Instances of this class allow to access Classes at runtime in a special application type.

    There is no need to work with this interface directly. The instance to use and all required functionality is provided by the ClassLoaderUtil.

    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
    See Also:
    ClassLoaderUtil

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Class<?> getClassforName(String className)
      Returns the Class for the given class name similar to Class.forName(String).
      <S> Iterable<S> loadServices(Class<?> contextClass, Class<S> service)
      Loads all configured services similar to ServiceLoader.load(Class).

    • Method Detail

      • getClassforName

        Class<?> getClassforName(String className)
                         throws ClassNotFoundException
        Returns the Class for the given class name similar to Class.forName(String).
        Parameters:
        className - The name of the class.
        Returns:
        The Class instance.
        Throws:
        ClassNotFoundException - Occurred Exception if Class is not available.

      • loadServices

        <S> Iterable<S> loadServices(Class<?> contextClass,
                           Class<S> service)
        Loads all configured services similar to ServiceLoader.load(Class).
        Parameters:
        contextClass - The calling Class which ClassLoader knows the configuration-file.
        service - The requested service.
        Returns:
        An Iterable with the created service instances.
